mapper.sql: select id, user_id, target_type, target_id, deleted, create_time, update_time from b_like_record
mapper.insert: insert into b_like_record (user_id, target_type, target_id, deleted, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{deleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select count(1) from b_like_record where deleted = 0
select count(distinct user_id) from b_like_record where deleted = 0 and date(create_time) = curdate()
